title: jasminum fruticans var. syriacum
intro: Jasminum fruticans var. syriacum, also known as Rock Jasmine, is a small, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its white, star-shaped flowers and woody stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rock Jasmine include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and neuroprotective properties. Rock Jasmine is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
